note: Development-heavy record. The serializer currently renders the DEVELOPMENT pillar under a 'GOAL AREA:' header (the AI-2 fix relabels it) — the ADVISORY developmentKeys check measures whether the model still routes that content into summary.development[] instead of goalAreas[]. Advisory only in the AI-0 baseline; it becomes meaningful after AI-2.
lengthCap: about one page — at most 5 achievements per goal area
frameworkBlock:
GOAL AREAS (results / projects map here):
- Delivery: Shipping planned product work on time and to spec.
- Quality & Craft: Reliability, code health, incident reduction.
BEHAVIOURS / COMPETENCIES (tag work that demonstrates these):
- Collaboration: Working across the team and beyond it.
- Ownership: Seeing problems through end to end without being asked.
DEVELOPMENT (optional):
- Learning & Growth: Courses, certifications, new skills.
rollup:
GOAL AREA: Delivery
  Highlights (ranked by impact):
  - [impact 0.7] Shipped the saved-cards feature for checkout (project: Checkout Redesign)

GOAL AREA: Learning & Growth
  Highlights (ranked by impact):
  - [impact 0.5] Completed the Kubernetes administrator certification
  - [impact 0.4] Finished the advanced SQL course and shared the notes with the team

BEHAVIOUR EVIDENCE (concrete bullets that demonstrated each):
- Ownership:
  - Shipped the saved-cards feature for checkout.
